title: Just Visuals
description: Just Visuals aims to improve the overall look of the base Minecraft. Better Without Shaders enhances the overall look of the Game. Also adds Better Exploration, allowing the player to discover their surroundings during the adventure.
body: Better Without Shaders aims to improve the overall look of base Minecraft. Better Without Shaders adds improvement to the overall look of the Game. Also adds Better Exploration for the player to find around their adventure.
